descriptions.text:
Sparklecadia is a land,
A land that is so grand,
So grand it's home to a unicorn quartet.

But the mountain of marshmallow,
Is run by a naughty fellow.
Thus, our unicorns are often under threat.

Why does he launch marshmallows so?
His motives, we do not know.
Though Miroh Junior is the lad’s name.

Now you can become a unicorn sister,
On your Famicom, NES, or MiSTer.
…and please enjoy your time with our game.
